changelog: Time tracking: fixed paused timer duration calculation — paused_seconds now correctly subtracted everywhere
Reports: agents now see 'My time' label and filter badge instead of misleading 'Total time'
Reports: added DateTime validation guard to prevent crash on malformed worklog edits
Reports: added query limit (10,000 entries) to prevent memory exhaustion on large datasets
Reports: hidden redundant Agents breakdown table for non-admin users
